news.t: Capital Group Launches 7 New ETFs on the New York Stock Exchange

overview.description: The Capital Group Ultra Short Income ETF (CGUI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund of USD-denominated, income-producing debt securities with investment grade ratings and ultra-short term duration. It seeks current income and capital preservation while aiming to maintain a dollar-weighted average maturity of two years or less. CGUI was launched on Jun 25, 2024 and is issued by Capital Group.

data.title: Capital Group Launches 7 New ETFs on the New York Stock Exchange
data.text: New services include four equity and three fixed income ETFs, bringing Capital Group's ETF platform to 21 LOS ANGELES, June 27, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- Capital Group has introduced seven new active, tran...
